user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter the exit list by status, so that I can track exits through resignation, approval, exited, and FFS stages
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Exit List screen; When I select a status such as Resignation initiated, Exited, Pending FFS, or Closed FFS; Then only matching exits are listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter exits by initiation period, department, and exit type, so that I can locate specific exits
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Exit List screen; When I set an initiation period and select a department and exit type; Then only matching exits are shown

user_story: As an approver, I want to act on exits pending with me via the Task column, so that I can approve, cancel, or revoke them
acceptance_criteria: Given an exit has status Pending with me; When I open its Task; Then I can approve, reject, withdraw, or revoke the exit

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to see the exit initiation date and tentative last working day for each exit, so that I can plan offboarding
acceptance_criteria: Given exits are listed; When I view a row; Then I can see employee details, reporting manager, exit initiation date, and tentative last working day

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to search and reset the exit list, so that I can refine or clear my query
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set filter criteria; When I click Search; Then matching records are displayed; And clicking Reset clears the filters
